tiktok.caption: You upgrade your phone every 22 months. Here's what that's actually costing you at retirement. The math is wild.

youtube_short.title: Your Phone Upgrade Habit Costs $221,000
title_alternatives: The $221K Mistake You Make Every 2 Years
Stop Upgrading Your Phone (Here's the Math)
youtube_short.description: The average American upgrades their phone every 22 months — and 75% do it before the old one even breaks. That habit costs $500 a year in phone spending. But here's what nobody tells you: invest that $500 a year at a 10% market return for 40 years and you get $221,000. Not a typo. Your phone upgrade cycle has a six-figure price tag. The fix is dead simple — stretch upgrades from 2 years to 4 and recover over $110,000. Watch before you buy your next phone. #personalfinance #investing #moneytips #compoundinterest #finance
